title: Case, Simon - Cabinet Secretary and Head of the Civil Service - ACOBA advice
body: "Lord Case left his role as Cabinet Secretary and Head of the Civil Service in December 2024.  Adviser, Invisible Technologies Lord Case sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a paid role with Adviser with Invisible Technologies. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2025; and the role was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Independent Consultancy and commissions Lord Case sought the Committee’s advice about setting up an independent consultancy. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed was sent in June 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter can be found here.    Commission with Workday, Inc. An accessible version is available here.   Commission with Bridgepoint Group plc. An accessible version is available here.    Patron, Patchwork Foundation  Lord Case sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an unpaid appointment with the Patchwork Foundation. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in May 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Ambassador, RAF Charitable Trust  Lord Case sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an unpaid appointment with the RAF Charitable Trust. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in May 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
